Package i5.cb.api

Class CBConnectionData

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.ShallowCloneable
      • i5.cb.api.CBConnectionData
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable

    public class CBConnectionData
extends ShallowCloneable
implements java.io.Serializable
    connection data, as a shortcut. Contains everything that is needed to open a connection to a ConceptBase server. Can be passed around in the program before a connection is opened.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
